source:
%%spark
import java.nio.file.Paths

 val currentPath = Paths.get("").toAbsolutePath.toString
    println(s"Current Working Directory: $currentPath")

import ipywidgets as widgets
from IPython.display import display

# 创建用户名输入框
username = widgets.Text(
    value='',
    placeholder='请输入用户名',
    description='用户名:',
    disabled=False
)

# 创建密码输入框
password = widgets.Password(
    value='',
    placeholder='请输入密码',
    description='密码:',
    disabled=False
)

# 创建提交按钮
button = widgets.Button(
    description='提交',
    disabled=False,
    button_style='',  # 也可以设置 'success', 'info', 'warning', 'danger'
    tooltip='点击提交'
)

# 用于显示输出的区域
output = widgets.Output()

# 按钮点击事件处理函数
def on_button_clicked(b):
    with output:
        output.clear_output()  # 清除之前的输出
        print("用户名：", username.value)
        print("密码：", password.value)

# 将事件处理函数绑定到按钮点击事件上
button.on_click(on_button_clicked)

# 显示所有组件
display(username, password, button, output)

import ipywidgets as widgets
from IPython.display import display

# 创建用户名输入框
username = widgets.Text(
    value='',
    placeholder='请输入用户名',
    description='用户名:',
    disabled=False
)

# 创建密码输入框
password = widgets.Password(
    value='',
    placeholder='请输入密码',
    description='密码:',
    disabled=False
)

# 创建提交按钮
button = widgets.Button(
    description='提交',
    disabled=False,
    button_style='',  # 也可以设置 'success', 'info', 'warning', 'danger'
    tooltip='点击提交'
)

# 用于显示输出的区域
output = widgets.Output()

# 按钮点击事件处理函数
def on_button_clicked(b):
    with output:
        output.clear_output()  # 清除之前的输出
        print("用户名：", username.value)
        print("密码：", password.value)

# 将事件处理函数绑定到按钮点击事件上
button.on_click(on_button_clicked)

# 显示所有组件
display(username, password, button, output)

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
# Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
(df.write
 # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
 # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
 .option(Constants.SERVER, "dwleisun.sql.azuresynapse.net")
 # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
 .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, "abfss://synapsecontainer@seaadbadls2.dfs.core.windows.net/tmp")
 # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
 # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
 # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
 .mode("overwrite")
 # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
 .synapsesql("dwleisun.dbo.test"))
